title: Create a GitHub release (v0.1.0)
body: RSFC-03-1/2/3/4: No releases found. Create a tagged release following semver (e.g., v0.1.0) to pass 5 RSFC checks at once.

title: Register persistent identifier (DOI via Zenodo)
body: RSFC-01-1/2/3, RSFC-07-1/2: No persistent identifier found. Enable Zenodo-GitHub integration and create a release to get a DOI. Add the DOI to CITATION.cff and README.

title: Archive in Software Heritage
body: RSFC-08-1: Not archived in Software Heritage or Zenodo. Submit to https://archive.softwareheritage.org/save/ or enable via Zenodo.

title: Add repostatus badge to README
body: RSFC-05-1: No repostatus badge found. Add a badge from https://www.repostatus.org/ (e.g., Active or WIP) to the README.

title: Add contact/support metadata
body: RSFC-05-2: No contact or support information found. Add a support email or link to Issues in README or codemeta.json.

title: Declare contributors in codemeta.json
body: RSFC-06-2: Contributors not declared. Update codemeta.json to list contributors (auto-generate by re-running the CodeMeta workflow after adding contributor info).

title: Improve descriptive metadata
body: RSFC-04-4: Software descriptive metadata incomplete. Ensure codemeta.json has keywords, programming language, operating system, and application category.

title: Add installation instructions to README
body: RSFC-13-2: No installation instructions detected. The README has 'npm install' under Development but SOMEF may not detect it. Add a dedicated '## Installation' section.

title: Add tests
body: RSFC-14-1/2: No tests found and no test workflow. Add at least basic tests (e.g., component tests with Vitest) and a CI workflow to run them.

title: Link commits to issues
body: RSFC-17-3: Commits not linked to issues. Use issue references in commit messages (e.g., 'fixes #1') for future commits.
